---
title: "CSR-Analysis"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Complete Spatial Randomness (CSR)

```{r}
source('../utils/ReadData.R')

# Simulation
# https://rpubs.com/Peters64s/548577
library(future.apply)
plan(multisession, workers = 3)
message(paste("Cell:", availableCores() - 1))

set.seed(123)
```

## Distance to Nearest Youbike, MRT, Parking Distribution

```{r}
facility_list <- list(
  "Youbike" = youbike_sf,
  "MRT" = mrt_filtered,
  # "Parking" = parking_sf
  "Bus" = bus_filtered
  )

combined_data <- final_boundary_data
for (f_name in names(facility_list)){
  dt <- facility_list[[f_name]]
  
  nearest_idx <- st_nearest_feature(combined_sf, dt)
  dist_to_fac <- st_distance(combined_sf, dt[nearest_idx,], by_element = TRUE)
  
  combined_data$dist_to_nearest_fac <- as.numeric(dist_to_fac)
  threshold <- quantile(combined_data$dist_to_nearest_fac, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE)
  med <- median(combined_data$dist_to_nearest_fac, na.rm = TRUE)
  mean_dist <- mean(combined_data$dist_to_nearest_fac, na.rm = TRUE)
  # plot distribution
  distance_fac <- combined_data%>%
    filter(dist_to_nearest_fac <= threshold) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = dist_to_nearest_fac)) +
    geom_histogram(binwidth = 10) +
    # medianline
    geom_vline(xintercept = med, color = "blue", linetype = "dashed", size = 1) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = mean_dist, color = "red", linetype = "dashed", size = 1) +
    annotate("text", x = med, y = Inf, label = paste("Median:", round(med, 2)),
             color = "blue", vjust = 1.5, hjust = 1.1, size = 3.5) +
    annotate("text", x = mean_dist, y = Inf, label = paste("Median:", round(mean_dist, 2)),
             color = "red", vjust = 1.5, hjust = 1.1, size = 3.5) +
    labs(title = paste0("Distribution of Distance to Nearest" ,f_name , "Station"),
         x = paste0("Distance to Nearest",f_name ,"(meters)"),
         y = "Frequency") +
    theme_minimal()
  print(distance_fac)
  
  file_name <- paste0("../Layouts/distance_to_", f_name, "_histogram.png")
  ggsave(file_name, distance_fac, width = 8, height = 5)
}
```

## Youbike, MRT, Parking lot CSR pattern

```{r}
set.seed(123)
n_sim <- 30
dist_grid <- seq(0, 500, by = 5)

run_simulation <- function(i, target_dt, network_sf, size = 10000) {
  rand_pts <- st_sample(network_sf, size = size, type = "random") %>%
    st_as_sf() %>%
    st_cast("POINT")
  # 計算路網上的隨機點，到最近 YouBike 站的距離
  idx <- st_nearest_feature(rand_pts, target_dt)
  return(ecdf(as.numeric(st_distance(rand_pts, target_dt[idx, ], by_element = TRUE)))(dist_grid))
}
roads_study_area <- st_filter(roads_filtered, final_boundary)
```

```{r}
plot_overall_poi_surplus <- function(poi_name, sim_list, obs_dist_list, accident_sf, grid_dist = dist_grid) {
  
  message(poi_name)
  current_sim_matrix <- sim_list[[poi_name]]
  current_obs_dist <- obs_dist_list[[poi_name]]
  
  total_n <- nrow(accident_sf)
  
  obs_cdf_func <- ecdf(current_obs_dist)
  
  plot_data <- data.frame(dist = grid_dist) %>%
    mutate(
      mean_cdf = apply(current_sim_matrix, 1, mean),
      hi_cdf   = apply(current_sim_matrix, 1, max),
      lo_cdf   = apply(current_sim_matrix, 1, min),

      obs_cdf  = obs_cdf_func(dist),
    
      extra_accidents = (obs_cdf - mean_cdf) * total_n,
      mean_diff = 0, 
      hi_diff   = (hi_cdf - mean_cdf) * total_n,
      lo_diff   = (lo_cdf - mean_cdf) * total_n
    )
  
  p <- ggplot(data = plot_data, aes(x = dist)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lo_diff, ymax = hi_diff), fill = "grey70", alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_line(aes(y = mean_diff, linetype = "Expected Baseline (CSR)"), color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
    geom_line(aes(y = extra_accidents, color = "Actual Accident Surplus"), linewidth = 1.2) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, max(grid_dist))) +
    scale_color_manual(name = "", values = c("Actual Accident Surplus" = "#2c3e50")) +
    scale_linetype_manual(name = "", values = c("Expected Baseline (CSR)" = "dashed")) +
    labs(title = paste("Overall Spatial Accident Surplus:", poi_name),
         subtitle = paste("Total Analyzed Accidents (N) =", total_n),
         x = paste("Distance to Nearest", poi_name, "(m)"),
         y = "Extra Accidents (Actual - Expected)") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom",
          plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))
  
  return(p)
}
```

```{r}
for (name in names(poi_to_analyze)) {
  p <- plot_overall_poi_surplus(name, all_simulation, all_obs_distances, combined_sf)
  print(p)
  ggsave(paste0("../Layouts/Overall_Surplus_", name, ".png"), p, width = 7, height = 5)
}
```

# Speed Limit

## Accident Distribution

```{r}
# 串連速限以及youbike之間的關聯
med <- median(combined_data$`速限-第1當事者`, na.rm = TRUE)
mean_dist <- mean(combined_data$`速限-第1當事者`, na.rm = TRUE)
speed_distribution <- combined_data%>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_histogram(aes(x = `速限-第1當事者`), binwidth = 10, fill = "lightblue", color = "black") +
   geom_vline(xintercept = med, color = "blue", linetype = "dashed", size = 1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = mean_dist, color = "red", linetype = "dashed", size = 1) +
  annotate("text", x = med, y = Inf, label = paste("Median:", round(med, 2)),
           color = "blue", vjust = 1.5, hjust = -0.1, size = 3.5) +
  annotate("text", x = mean_dist, y = Inf, label = paste("Mean:", round(mean_dist, 2)),
           color = "red", vjust = 1.5, hjust = 1.1, size = 3.5) +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Speed Limits for Urban Road Accidents",
       x = "Speed Limit (km/h)",
       y = "Frequency") +
  theme_minimal()
speed_distribution
# ggsave("./Layouts/speed_limit_distribution.png", speed_distribution, width = 8, height = 5)
```

```         
```

# Speed Difference

```{r}
boundary <- read_csv('../../ST-RTA/ComputedDataV2/Taiwan/taiwan_無離島.csv')%>%
  st_as_sf(wkt = "geometry", crs = 3826)

differnce <- st_read("../CalculatedData/pairs_annot_all_cities.shp")%>%
  st_as_sf(geometry = "geometry", crs = 3826)%>%
  # find the points in boundary
  st_join(boundary, join = st_within, left = FALSE)
```

## Distribution

```{r}
# distribution
nearest_idx_spd <- st_nearest_feature(combined_sf, differnce)
dist_to_spd <- st_distance(combined_sf, differnce[nearest_idx_spd,], by_element = TRUE)
combined_data$dist_to_nearest_spd <- as.numeric(dist_to_spd)

threshold <- quantile(combined_data$dist_to_nearest_spd, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)
med <- median(combined_data$dist_to_nearest_spd, na.rm = TRUE)
mean_dist <- mean(combined_data$dist_to_nearest_spd, na.rm = TRUE)
distance_spd <- combined_data%>%
  filter(dist_to_nearest_spd <= threshold) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = dist_to_nearest_spd)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 10) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = med, color = "blue", linetype = "dashed", size = 1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = mean_dist, color = "red", linetype = "dashed", size = 1) +
  annotate("text", x = med, y = Inf, label = paste("Median:", round(med, 2)),
           color = "blue", vjust = 1.5, hjust = 1.1, size = 3.5) +
  annotate("text", x = mean_dist, y = Inf, label = paste("Median:", round(mean_dist, 2)),
           color = "red", vjust = 1.5, hjust = 1.1, size = 3.5) +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Distance to Nearest Youbike Station",
       x = "Distance to Nearest Youbike Station (meters)",
       y = "Frequency") +
  theme_minimal()
print(distance_spd)
# ggsave("../Layouts/distance_to_spd_histogram.png", distance_spd, width = 8, height = 5)
```

```{r}

## speed 不討論速差，只考慮距離到速差點
urban_mask_sd <- differnce %>% st_combine() %>% st_buffer(500) %>% st_as_sf()
sd_results_list <- future_lapply(1:n_sim, run_simulation, 
                                 target_dt = differnce, mask_sf = urban_mask_sd, future.seed = 999)
sd_sim_matrix <- do.call(cbind, sd_results_list)

sd_idx_obs <- st_nearest_feature(combined_sf, differnce)
sd_real_dist <- as.numeric(st_distance(combined_sf, differnce[sd_idx_obs,], by_element = TRUE))
sd_real_cdf <- ecdf(sd_real_dist)(dist_grid)

plot_data_sd <- data.frame(
  distance = dist_grid,
  obs = sd_real_cdf,
  hi = apply(sd_sim_matrix, 1, max),
  lo = apply(sd_sim_matrix, 1, min),
  mean = apply(sd_sim_matrix, 1, mean)
)

simulation <- ggplot(plot_data_sd, aes(x = distance)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lo, ymax = hi), fill = "grey70", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y = mean, color = "Random Baseline (CSR)"), linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = obs, color = "Real Accidents"), linewidth = 1.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Real Accidents" = "black", "Random Baseline (CSR)" = "red")) +
  labs(title = "Spatial Association Test",
       subtitle = paste0("Observed vs. ", n_sim, " Simulations"),
       x = "Distance to Nearest Speed Difference (meters)",
       y = "Cumulative Proportion (CDF)",
       color = "Legend") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
print(simulation)
# ggsave("../Layouts/simulation_speed.png", simulation, width = 5, height = 5)
```
